# synthetics_totp_variables_v2_check (Data Source)

Reads Synthetics TOTP variable metadata. TOTP secrets are not returned by the API and are not exposed by this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "synthetics_totp_variables_v2_check" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `totp_variables` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--totp_variables))

<a id="nestedblock--totp_variables"></a>
### Nested Schema for `totp_variables`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `digits` (Number)
- `hmac_digest` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `interval` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String)
